## beehiiv posts delete

Delete a post by ID

### Synopsis

Delete post

Delete or Archive a post. Any post that has been confirmed will have it's status changed to `archived`. Posts in the `draft` status will be permenantly deleted.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/posts/{postId}

```
beehiiv posts delete <postId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv posts delete post_123
beehiiv posts remove post_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for delete
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
